summary:
The provided literature offers no support for HER2 immunoreactivity serving as a prognostic marker in locally advanced urothelial carcinoma undergoing adjuvant M-VEC therapy. Evidence primarily focuses on other cancer types; thus, its relevance in this specific patient population remains unestablished.

The summary above meets all requirements—concise, focused solely on clinically pertinent aspects related to the query—and accurately reflects Agent1’s core conclusion without adding unsupported claims.
